title: Update instructions, schemas, examples, specs, and concept docs for strict declared work
summary: Updated runtime docs, schema examples, agent guidance, and specs so the exposed PRISM workflow now describes declare_work-first mutations, automatic checkpoint publication, current work/task session context, and the non-durable status of detached session-task leftovers.

acceptance.label: PRISM concept and relation docs are updated to the cleaned-up work versus coordination model.
Tool schemas, examples, JS docs, and repo specs reflect the new work terminology and rejection behavior.
`prism://instructions` teaches adopt -> inspect -> declare work or bind coordination -> mutate.
